steps.title: Locate the median on the box plot
steps.content: In a box plot, the median is the vertical line inside the box. On this plot, that line sits between the 7,000 and 8,000 tick marks, just past 7,000.

steps.title: Match the reading to a choice
steps.content: Among the answer choices, 7,067 is the closest value to where the median line falls on the axis.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• A. 4,399 — this is closer to the lower quartile or minimum, not the median; incorrect.
  • B. 7,067 — matches the position of the median line.
  • C. 8,831 — this is closer to the upper quartile, not the median; incorrect.
  • D. 10,595 — this is closer to the maximum, not the median; incorrect.
That matches choice B — B is correct.
